name: jobmeta-harvester-demo
description: Installierbare PWA mit derselben Dashboard-Oberfläche wie die lokale App.

scripts.test: python -m unittest discover tests && node --check static-api-shim.js && python scripts/verify_live_demo_files.py && python scripts/verify_vercel_public.py
scripts.vercel-build: node --check static-api-shim.js && python scripts/build_static_public.py && python scripts/verify_live_demo_files.py && python scripts/verify_vercel_public.py
